en_title: Summer Game Fest Stream Overrun with Demands for Destiny 3
subtitle: 粉丝刷屏请愿
opus_summary: 《命运》粉丝在夏日游戏节直播中刷屏要求《命运3》。此前彭博社报道称《命运3》未在开发，Bungie将专注《失落星船：马拉松》并面临大规模裁员。粉丝计划6月9日冲击《命运2》在线峰值以证明系列价值。

paragraphs.en: Destiny fans aren't backing down when it comes to demanding Destiny 3 . Earlier this week, fans spammed "#WeWantDestiny3" in the chat for PlayStation's State of Play along with various Destiny-inspired emotes. Now, Bungie fans are storming into Geoff Keighley's Summer Game Fest event with the same pleas.
paragraphs.cn: 《命运》粉丝在要求《命运3》这件事上毫不退让。本周早些时候，粉丝们在PlayStation的State of Play直播聊天室里刷屏「#WeWantDestiny3」和各种《命运》主题表情。如今，Bungie粉丝们又涌入了Geoff Keighley的夏日游戏节直播，发出同样的呼声。

paragraphs.en: The rally comes after Bungie announced that it would be ending support for Destiny 2 after the game's final update in June. Although Destiny 2 is almost a decade old, it felt rather uncerimonious and it doesn't seem like it was ever meant to end this early, as Bungie noted it will include content from would-be future updates in the final update.
paragraphs.cn: 这场请愿源于Bungie此前宣布，将在6月《命运2》最后一次更新后停止支持。尽管《命运2》已运营近十年，但这样的收尾显得颇为草率，而且似乎本不该这么早结束——Bungie表示，最终更新将包含原本计划在未来更新中推出的内容。

paragraphs.en: Bloomberg later reported that Destiny 3 was not in active development and Bungie would be focusing its efforts on supporting Marathon. The studio is also expected to undergo "significant" layoffs, which would make it difficult to develop a brand new Destiny game. Bungie is reportedly interested in developing more Destiny games and will be pitching games set in the universe, in addition to other projects. It remains to be seen what gets greenlit and what the future of Bungie looks like going forward.
paragraphs.cn: 彭博社随后报道称，《命运3》并未在积极开发中，Bungie将把重心放在支持《失落星船：马拉松》上。该工作室预计还将进行「大规模」裁员，这使得开发全新《命运》游戏变得困难。据报道，Bungie有意开发更多《命运》游戏，并将推出设定在该宇宙中的作品，此外还有其他项目。哪些项目能获批、Bungie的未来走向如何，仍有待观察。

paragraphs.en: Destiny fans been trying to rally support to show Bungie and PlayStation that Destiny 3 is a project worth pursuing. Fans are planning to swarm the servers of Destiny 2 on June 9th, hoping to surpass the all-time peak player count of Marathon to show that Destiny is where Bungie should be focusing its efforts. Whether or not it makes a difference remains to be seen.
paragraphs.cn: 《命运》粉丝一直在试图集结力量，向Bungie和PlayStation证明《命运3》是一个值得推进的项目。粉丝们计划在6月9日涌入《命运2》服务器，希望超越《失落星船：马拉松》的历史最高同时在线玩家数，以此表明《命运》才是Bungie应该集中精力的方向。至于此举能否奏效，还有待观察。

paragraphs.en: A new Destiny game would likely take at least another 4 or 5 years to make, if not longer. It would also cost hundreds of millions of dollars, unless Bungie can find a way to scale down the project to be cheaper and quicker to make. It seems hard to imagine Destiny 3 moving forward without major changes, but crazier things have happened in the gaming industry.
paragraphs.cn: 一款新的《命运》游戏可能至少还需要4到5年才能制作完成，甚至更久。成本也将高达数亿美元（约合人民币数十亿元），除非Bungie能找到方法缩减项目规模，使其更便宜、更快地制作。很难想象《命运3》能在不进行重大调整的情况下推进，但游戏行业里更疯狂的事也发生过。

paragraphs.en: For all other things Summer Game Fest, be sure to check out our live coverage , where we will be posting all of the biggest announcements and news.
paragraphs.cn: 至于夏日游戏节的其他内容，请务必查看我们的实时报道，我们将发布所有重大公告和新闻。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在X上关注他 @Cade_Onder。
